nasb.text: Requite them according to their work and according to the evil of their practices; Requite them according to the deeds of their hands; Repay them their recompense.

esv.text: Give to them according to their work and according to the evil of their deeds; give to them according to the work of their hands; render them their due reward.

cnv.text: 願你按著他們所作的，照著他們所行的惡報應他們； 願你照著他們手所作的報應他們， 把他們應得的報應加給他們。

ccb.text: 求你使他们罪有应得， 按他们的恶行， 按他们手上的罪恶报应他们。

csbs.text: 求你照着他们的作为， 照着他们所行的邪恶对待他们； 求你照着他们手所做的对待他们， 把他们应得的报应加给他们！
